title: Natural bodybuilding will humble you.
hook: Natural bodybuilding will humble you.
caption:
August 2025 → July 2026.

Natural bodybuilding will humble you.

Because there is no shortcut around the time.

You can’t force muscle to grow overnight. You can’t rush the thousands of meals, the progressive overload, the reps taken to places you’d rather quit, the sleep, the recovery, the discipline to eat enough when gaining feels uncomfortable- and the discipline to keep going when the mirror doesn’t seem to be changing fast enough.

You just keep showing up.

Meal after meal.
Workout after workout.
Month after month.

And for a long time, it can feel like nothing is happening.

Until one

title: The photo on the left had no idea what was waiting for him.
hook: The photo on the left had no idea what was waiting for him.
caption:
The photo on the left had no idea what was waiting for him.

Five years of discipline.
Thousands of workouts.
Countless days of choosing consistency over excuses.

I didn’t change overnight.
I changed because I refused to quit.

Here’s to becoming someone your younger self would be proud of. 💪🏾

#physiquetransformation #fitnesslife #nopainnogain #bodybuilding

title: Everyone wants the “few weeks out” look… until they understand what the “few weeks out” look actually requires.
hook: Everyone wants the “few weeks out” look… until they understand what the “few weeks out” look actually requires.
caption:
Everyone wants the “few weeks out” look… until they understand what the “few weeks out” look actually requires.

Right now, I’m close to stepping on stage. I’m leaner, yes. But some days I’m also flat, depleted, hungry, tired, and not nearly as strong as I was earlier in prep.

And that’s not a “poor me” post. I chose this. I LOVE this sport, and I’m willing to do what it takes to bring my best to the stage.

But I also think we need to stop pretending that stage lean is the ultimate goal for everyone.

You can be lean. Muscular. Strong. Athletic. Confident as hell in your body. And you can do

title: Chest & Back (Chest Focus) 🦍 @ciel_fitness
hook: Chest & Back (Chest Focus) 🦍 @ciel_fitness
caption:
Chest & Back (Chest Focus) 🦍 @ciel_fitness 

Started by waking the chest up with pec deck flyes, building from 60 kg all the way to the full stack. High-quality contractions before moving into the heavy work.

Then it was time to move some dumbbells:
🔥 Incline DB Press: 35 → 40 → 45 kg with progressive overload (15, 12, 10 reps). Managed to squeeze out a couple of extra reps on the final set.
🔥 Flat DB Press followed with the same approach.

Finished chest with machine presses and cable flyes, focusing on stretching, squeezing, and making every rep count—not just moving the weight.

For back,

title: A session at @buzzgymreadingcentral yesterday felt like coming home.
hook: A session at @buzzgymreadingcentral yesterday felt like coming home.
caption:
A session at @buzzgymreadingcentral yesterday felt like coming home.

It was great to catch up with so many familiar faces, have a few good conversations, and be back in a place that holds so many memories for me.

Had a solid upper-body session with my bro @onbladesedge, making progress on weights that once felt almost impossible. We left the gym happy, knowing we gave everything to the session.

Looking forward to coming back again soon. Most of my personal training journey and memories in the UK started right here, and it’ll always be a special place to me.

#PersonalTraining #OnlineCoachin

title: From intimidated… to empowered. 💪✨
hook: From intimidated… to empowered. 💪✨
caption:
From intimidated… to empowered. 💪✨

The first picture was taken years ago when I was just getting started.

I remember walking into the gym and avoiding the weight room because I was intimidated. The guys were always over there, and I was terrified someone would notice I didn’t know what I was doing. I was even afraid to stand there and read the instructions on the machines.

Back then, all I wanted was to get “lean” and “toned.”

Then I found Beachbody, and one program completely changed the way I looked at fitness: LIIFT4. It taught me that lifting weights wasn’t something to fear, it was so

title: 8 months. Zero excuses. This is what real coaching looks like. 💪🔥
hook: 8 months. Zero excuses. This is what real coaching looks like. 💪🔥
caption:
8 months. Zero excuses. This is what real coaching looks like. 💪🔥

You’ve seen the transformation. Here’s what actually got him there:

✅ A structured plan — no more guessing what to do in the gym
✅ Real accountability — someone checking that you actually showed up
✅ Nutrition guidance that fits your life, not a generic PDF
✅ Weekly check-ins so you adjust before you plateau
✅ 100% natural — real results you can sustain

Here’s the truth: the plan doesn’t matter if you don’t start it. Every week you wait is another week you could’ve been 8 months into your own transformation instead of still t

title: Most people underestimate hydration.
hook: Most people underestimate hydration.
caption:
Most people underestimate hydration.

They’ll spend money chasing the next supplement…

…but forget that even mild dehydration can make training feel harder than it needs to.

During prep, every workout counts.

That’s why I sip on Epic Aminos throughout my sessions to stay hydrated while getting essential amino acids in.

The little habits are what separate good from great.

@nutrifittlabs Code: THELASTNATTYLEFT 

#mensphysique #naturalbodybuilding #fitnessmotivation #gymlife #workoutmotivation

title: I wanted to be stronger. I wanted to become a better dad. I wanted my kids to see what discipline and hard work look like.
hook: I wanted to be stronger. I wanted to become a better dad. I wanted my kids to see what discipline and hard work look like.
caption:
250 lbs ➝ 179 lbs.

I wanted to be stronger. I wanted to become a better dad. I wanted my kids to see what discipline and hard work look like.

This isn’t the finish line, it’s proof that consistency beats excuses.

If you’re looking in the mirror wondering if you can change, you can.

I was there.

Follow my journey as I continue building muscle, losing fat, and becoming the best version of myself.

If I can do it, so can you. 💪🔥 #WeightLossJourney #FitnessJourney #Transformation #FatLoss #MuscleBuilding BodyRecomp WorkoutMotivation

title: Everyone wants the secret.
hook: Everyone wants the secret.
caption:
Everyone wants the secret.

There isn’t one.

You don’t need another supplement, another workout program, or another “30-day challenge.”

You need to master the fundamentals.

Focus on these 10 things:
✔️ Consistency
✔️ Protein
✔️ Strength Training
✔️ Steps
✔️ Sleep
✔️ Hydration
✔️ Whole Foods
✔️ Calories
✔️ Patience
✔️ Lifestyle

None of them are flashy.
None of them are new.
But together, they’re responsible for the vast majority of long-term results.

Stop chasing perfection.
Stop chasing trends.

Build habits you can repeat day after day.

Your future body is built by the choices you make

title: Ok, so I'm in a funk, I'll be honest and admit it.

title: 🥶 Ice baths aren't crazy... they're science.
hook: 🥶 Ice baths aren't crazy... they're science.
caption:
.
🥶 Ice baths aren't crazy... they're science.
Painkillers often mask the symptoms. Cold therapy helps calm excessive inflammation so your body can focus on healing and recovery.
.
The same principle applies to fitness.
Stop chasing quick fixes. Address the root cause, trust the process, and your body will reward you.
.
If you're ready to break through limiting beliefs and build the physique you've always wanted, message me. Let's create a plan that delivers real, lasting results.
.
#BeyondMatter #BodybuildingCoach #Mindset #Recovery #PhysiqueTransformation
